findings.title: Potential SQL Injection pattern
findings.remediation: Use parameterized queries and strict allow-list input validation.
findings.secure_example: Use prepared statements and bind variables for all user-provided parameters.

findings.title: Potential Cross-Site Scripting pattern
findings.remediation: Apply contextual output encoding and enforce a strict Content Security Policy.
findings.secure_example: Encode untrusted output by context and use non-inline scripts with CSP nonce/hash.

findings.title: Potential secret token/private key exposure
findings.remediation: Remove committed secrets, rotate credentials, and enforce secret scanning pre-commit checks.
findings.secure_example: Use secret managers and inject credentials at runtime via environment/identity bindings.

findings.title: Insecure configuration indicator
findings.remediation: Disable debug in production and constrain CORS to trusted origins.
findings.secure_example: Set debug=false and configure explicit CORS origin allow-lists.

notes: Sample report committed for documentation/demo purposes. Generated against the included sample inputs in data/samples/.
